actions.description: Open a target URL and capture the HTML snapshot.
Click a bounded selector in the current page.
Fill a bounded input field in the current page.
Authenticate a bounded browser session with vault-backed credentials.
Create a bounded test account or synthetic user.
Wait for a selector or a bounded timeout.
Validate the last HTTP status code.
Validate that expected text exists in the current HTML snapshot.
Validate that the current URL contains an expected fragment.
Extract the current page title from the last HTML snapshot.
Capture a full-page screenshot for the current state.
Read the agent mailbox and consume a magic link email.
Read the agent mailbox and consume a one-time email code.
Read the agent mailbox, open a reset link and complete a bounded password reset flow.
